name: psycle-class-finder
description: Find and book Psycle fitness classes

scripts.check: node -e "const{execFileSync}=require('child_process'),fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');const files=[...fs.readdirSync('js').filter(f=>f.endsWith('.js')).map(f=>p.join('js',f)),'sw.js','ios-app/build.js','ios-app/www/native-bridge.js'].filter(f=>fs.existsSync(f));let bad=0;for(const f of files){try{execFileSync(process.execPath,['--check',f],{stdio:['ignore','ignore','pipe']});}catch(e){bad++;process.stderr.write('[check] syntax error in '+f+'\n'+String(e.stderr||e.message)+'\n');}}if(bad){console.error('[check] '+bad+' file(s) failed --check');process.exit(1);}console.log('[check] OK — '+files.length+' file(s) parsed');"
scripts.ci: npm run check && npm run test && npm run drift
